Title: Establishes a statewide advance care planning public awareness campaign and a community based advance care planning outreach grant program; appropriation
Summary: Establishes a statewide advance care planning public awareness campaign and a community based advance care planning outreach grant program to fund not-for-profit community-based organizations, faith-based organizations, immigrant-serving organizations, senior-serving agencies, housing-based organizations, and other trusted community partners to conduct advance care planning education, outreach, and navigation.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the public health law, in relation to the statewide advance care planning public awareness campaign and to establish a community-based advance care planning outreach grant program; and making an appropriation therefore
